title: 三大实验室或独占AGI价值 分享存风险
full_text:
Post
Log in Sign up
Post
Ethan Mollick
@emollick
If AGI is achievable & labs can be banned from using a model internally ONLY if they release the model publicly, the Big Three labs may decide it is better to capture all the value from AGI themselves by expansion & acquisition. Sharing AI access with other firms triggers risk.
12:26 AM · Jun 16, 2026 20.1K Views

discovery_record.discovery_title: 三大实验室或独占AGI价值 分享存风险
discovery_record.discovery_summary: 如果AGI可实现，并且只有在实验室公开发布模型的情况下才能禁止其内部使用，那么三大实验室可能会决定通过扩张和收购来自己获取AGI的所有价值。与其他公司共享AI访问会引发风险。

key_excerpts.text: 如果AGI可实现，并且只有在实验室公开发布模型的情况下才能禁止其内部使用，那么三大实验室可能会决定通过扩张和收购来自己获取AGI的所有价值。与其他公司共享AI访问会引发风险。

Post Log in Sign up Post Ethan Mollick @emollick If AGI is achievable & labs can be banned from using a model internally ONLY if they release the model publicly, the Big Three labs may decide it is better to capture all the value from AGI themselves by expansion & acquisition.
Sharing AI access with other firms triggers risk.

company_actions: Post Log in Sign up Post Ethan Mollick @emollick If AGI is achievable & labs can be banned from using a model internally ONLY if they release the model publicly, the Big Three labs may decide it is better to capture all the value from AGI themselves by expansion & acquisition.
risks_or_constraints: 如果AGI可实现，并且只有在实验室公开发布模型的情况下才能禁止其内部使用，那么三大实验室可能会决定通过扩张和收购来自己获取AGI的所有价值。与其他公司共享AI访问会引发风险。
Sharing AI access with other firms triggers risk.
